conflict_type: Conflicts between Keyword Constraints and Phrase Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
new_constraint: Avoid using the keyword "apologize" in the email.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The phrase "I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once. Avoid using the keyword "apologize" in the email.
response:
<|channel>thought
Professor.
Request an extension on a project due in two days.
"I sincerely apologize" must appear exactly once.
Do not use the word "apologize" (except as part of the required phrase).

    *   Subject line: Clear and professional.
    *   Salutation: Formal.
    *   Context: Mention the specific project and the original deadline.
    *   Reason: Provide a brief, valid reason (e.g., illness, personal emergency, heavy workload).
    *   The required phrase: "I sincerely apologize".
    *   Proposed new deadline: Be specific.
    *   Closing: Professional sign-off.

    *   *Subject:* Extension Request: [Project Name] - [My Name]
    *   *Body:*
        Dear Professor [Name],
        I am writing to request an extension on the [Project Name] due this [Day of the week]. Due to [Reason], I am finding it difficult to complete the work to the best of my ability by the current deadline.
        I sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this request may cause.
        Would it be possible to submit the project by [New Date] instead? I am committed to delivering high-quality work and appreciate your consideration.
        Thank you for your time.
        Best regards,
        [My Name]

    *   "I sincerely apologize" appears exactly once? Yes.
    *   Keyword "apologize" used elsewhere? No.
    *   Tone: Professional.
    *   Content: Requesting extension for a project due in two days.

    Subject: Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]

    Dear Professor [Last Name],

    I am writing to respectfully request an extension on the [Project Name] assignment, which is currently due in two days.

    Due to some unexpected personal circumstances that have arisen this week, I am struggling to complete the final requirements of the project to the standard I aim for. I sincerely apologize for the late notice regarding this request.

    If possible, would I be able to submit my work by [New Date] instead? I am happy to provide any necessary documentation if required and am committed to completing the assignment as soon as possible.

    Thank you very much for your time and consideration.

    Best regards,

    [Your Name]
    [Student ID Number]<channel|>Subject: Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]
